dependencies: Single or limited number of suppliers for certain products, services, data and information
Amazon Web Services for cloud-based services
Google for workspace and enterprise services
Third-party printing and distribution partners for books and newspapers
Content suppliers for data and information
risks: Reductions, interruptions or other issues affecting supply from single or limited suppliers
Significant increase in price from key suppliers
Supplier consolidation reducing number of providers and increasing leverage
Cybersecurity incidents, data center or systems outages at suppliers
Labor shortages, insufficient capacity and supply chain issues
Supplier breach or termination of agreements
Inflationary pressures, labor shortages, higher transportation costs and delays
Supply chain disruptions affecting paper and printing/distribution
Closure or conversion of newsprint mills
Natural disasters, extreme weather, pandemics affecting supply chain
Tariffs or other changes in trade policy affecting paper and supplies

regulatory_risks: EU Benchmarks Regulation (EU BMR) for OPIS price assessments
Data privacy laws including GDPR (EU), UK GDPR, CCPA (California), state data privacy laws in US
Children's Online Privacy Protection Act (COPPA)
California Age Appropriate Design Code (CAADC)
New York Child Data Protection Act
US Department of Justice data regulations restricting data transfer to countries of concern
UK Data (Use and Access) Act 2025 (DUA Act)
Privacy and Electronic Communications Regulations 2003 (PECR) in UK
Australia Privacy Act 1988 and Australian Privacy Principles (APPs)
Privacy and Other Legislation Amendment Bill 2024 in Australia
UK Press Recognition Panel and IPSO regulation
UK Digital Markets, Competition and Consumers Act 2024 restricting foreign ownership of newspapers
UK Communications Act 2003 and Broadcasting Code for radio stations
Ofcom regulation for radio and on-demand services in UK
Antitrust and competition laws in various jurisdictions
Intellectual property laws and regulations, including AI-related regulations
Tax laws and regulations in US and international jurisdictions including OECD Pillar 2 global minimum tax
Digital services taxes in certain jurisdictions
Trade restrictions, tariffs, and economic sanctions
Foreign Corrupt Practices Act and UK Bribery Act
ESG-related laws and regulations including anti-ESG and anti-DEI legislation
AI-focused consumer protection and data privacy laws
Employment and labor laws
Environmental regulations including EU Deforestation Regulation

sanction_risks: Compliance with economic sanctions and trade restrictions
Restrictions on access by and transfer of sensitive personal data to countries of concern
Geopolitical tensions and conflicts affecting operations
Retaliatory actions by foreign governments including censorship, barring or detention of journalists
